title.zh: OpenMemory Plus - AI Agent 双层记忆框架
title.en: OpenMemory Plus - AI Agent Dual-Layer Memory Framework

zh: 架构设计：设计双层记忆架构（短期记忆 + 长期记忆），实现跨会话上下文保持
核心开发：基于 Qdrant 向量数据库的记忆存储与检索系统
测试体系构建：构建 Agent 自闭环测试体系，15 项端到端测试全自动化
en: Architecture Design: Designed dual-layer memory architecture (short-term + long-term) for cross-session context retention
Core Development: Built memory storage and retrieval system based on Qdrant vector database
Testing System Construction: Established Agent self-closed-loop testing system with 15 fully automated end-to-end tests

zh: 设计双层记忆架构，跨会话上下文保持率 95%+
实现 ROT 智能过滤（Redundant/Obsolete/Trivial），减少 40% 冗余记忆
构建 Agent 自闭环测试体系，15 项端到端测试全自动化
设计统一 _omp/ 目录结构，支持 4+ IDE Agent 无缝共享
en: Designed dual-layer memory architecture achieving 95%+ cross-session context retention rate
Implemented ROT intelligent filtering (Redundant/Obsolete/Trivial), reducing redundant memory by 40%
Built Agent self-closed-loop testing system with 15 fully automated end-to-end tests
Designed unified _omp/ directory structure supporting seamless sharing across 4+ IDE Agents

description.zh: OpenMemory Plus 是一个为 AI Agent 设计的双层记忆框架，解决跨会话上下文丢失问题。支持 Augment、Cursor、Windsurf、Cline 等主流 IDE Agent，通过 MCP 协议实现统一记忆管理。
description.en: OpenMemory Plus is a dual-layer memory framework designed for AI Agents to solve cross-session context loss issues. It supports mainstream IDE Agents like Augment, Cursor, Windsurf, and Cline, achieving unified memory management through the MCP protocol.

highlights.zh: AI Agent 双层记忆框架，实现跨会话 95%+ 上下文保持率
highlights.en: AI Agent dual-layer memory framework achieving 95%+ cross-session context retention

project.impact: 跨会话上下文保持率 95%+，减少 40% 冗余记忆

title.zh: 磕线 (Betaline) - 独立开发全流程 iOS 应用

zh: 产品设计
UI/UX
iOS 开发
后端开发
AI 模型训练
DevOps
en: Product Design
UI/UX
iOS Development
Backend Development
AI Model Training
DevOps

zh: 独立完成全流程开发：产品/UI/前后端/AI/DevOps/运营
设计 VideoMind Chain-of-Roles 工作流（4000+ 行，6 角色），成本降低 39%，准确率 92%
训练 YOLO11m 岩点检测 + MobileNet V3 分类器，CoreML 导出实现 300x 加速
构建 Go/Gin 三层架构 + JWT 双令牌轮换 + 8 层中间件
自研 MCP Server（25 个运维工具）实现 AI Agent 远程服务器控制
en: Completed full-stack development independently: product/UI/frontend/backend/AI/DevOps/operations
Designed VideoMind Chain-of-Roles workflow (4000+ lines, 6 roles), reducing cost by 39% with 92% accuracy
Trained YOLO11m climbing hold detection + MobileNet V3 classifier, achieving 300x speedup via CoreML export
Built Go/Gin three-layer architecture with JWT dual-token rotation and 8 middleware layers
Developed custom MCP Server (25 ops tools) enabling AI Agent remote server control

description.zh: 磕线是一款从 0 到 1 独立开发的攀岩 iOS 应用，涵盖产品设计、UI/UX、iOS 前端、Go 后端、AI 模型训练、DevOps 全流程。核心功能包括视频分析攀岩动作、岩点检测与分类、训练记录管理等。
description.en: Betaline is a climbing iOS app independently developed from scratch, covering the full process of product design, UI/UX, iOS frontend, Go backend, AI model training, and DevOps. Core features include video analysis of climbing movements, hold detection and classification, and training record management.

highlights.zh: 全栈独立开发上线，集成 AI 视频分析与岩点检测
highlights.en: Full-stack independent launch with integrated AI video analysis and climbing hold detection

project.impact: AI 模型推理速度提升 300 倍

title.zh: 风控审核大模型 AI Agent
title.en: Risk Control Review Large Model AI Agent

zh: 架构设计：主导五代架构演进路线，从朴素 RAG 演进到 Phase-Gated Controlled ReAct
核心开发：Orchestrator 编排引擎、领域 Agent 路由、MacroTool 取证体系、规则仲裁引擎
质量体系：Langfuse 可观测链路 + 声明式 Trace 验证框架 + RAGAS 自动评估
en: Architecture Design: Led the evolution roadmap of five generations of architecture, from naive RAG to Phase-Gated Controlled ReAct
Core Development: Orchestrator engine, domain Agent routing, MacroTool evidence collection system, rule arbitration engine
Quality System: Langfuse observable pipeline + declarative Trace verification framework + RAGAS automatic evaluation

zh: 设计 Phase-Gated Controlled ReAct 架构，将 Agent 审核流程拆为取证→定性→裁决 3 阶段确定性流水线，准确率从 70% 提升至 90%+
构建五层正交架构（Entry/Runtime/Agent/Tool/Policy）+ 注册中心路由，新增审核场景仅需添加配置文件和注册 Tool，不修改主流程代码
实现 Go 原生 BM25 知识检索引擎（中文分词 + 530 条规则库），将审核规则注入从全量 5000 token 降至按需 200 token，效率提升 25 倍
构建声明式 Trace 验证框架（YAML spec + Go CLI + 14 种断言操作符），实现 Agent 行为的自动化质量验证，替代人工目视 trace 判断
en: Designed Phase-Gated Controlled ReAct architecture, splitting the Agent review process into a deterministic 3-stage pipeline (evidence collection → qualification → adjudication), improving accuracy from ~70% to 90%+
Built a five-layer orthogonal architecture (Entry/Runtime/Agent/Tool/Policy) + registry routing, enabling new review scenarios by adding config files and registering Tools without modifying core code
Implemented a native Go BM25 knowledge retrieval engine (Chinese word segmentation + 530 rule library), reducing rule injection from 5000 tokens to 200 tokens on-demand, improving efficiency by 25x
Built a declarative Trace verification framework (YAML spec + Go CLI + 14 assertion operators), enabling automated quality verification of Agent behavior, replacing manual trace inspection

description.zh: 基于大模型的智能风控审核系统，通过 AI Agent 自动处理企业微信生态中的风控审核工单。主导 V1→V5 五代架构演进，核心设计哲学是'不信任 LLM 的流程判断，只信任 LLM 的内容判断'。
description.en: An intelligent risk control review system based on large models, using AI Agents to automatically handle risk review tickets in the WeCom ecosystem. Led the evolution from V1 to V5 architecture, with a core design philosophy of 'distrusting LLM's process judgment, trusting only LLM's content judgment'.

highlights.zh: 设计 Phase-Gated Controlled ReAct 架构，将 LLM 推理与确定性流程控制分离，准确率提升至 90%+，日均自动结单 300+。
highlights.en: Designed Phase-Gated Controlled ReAct architecture, separating LLM reasoning from deterministic process control, achieving 90%+ accuracy and 300+ daily automated ticket closures.

project.impact: 准确率从 70% 提升至 90%+，日均自动结单 300+，节省 2+ 人力/天

title.zh: portrait-platform - 策略全生命周期管理平台
title.en: Portrait Platform - Strategy Full Lifecycle Management Platform

zh: 未提供
en: Not Provided

zh: 刷单欺诈率降低30%
贷款投诉率降低23%
识别并处理228个低质量策略，误封率从2.4%降至0%
PKV分布式序列化写入性能提升130倍（从90k/s到1200w/s）
en: Reduced fraudulent brushing by 30%
Reduced loan complaints by 23%
Identified and handled 228 low-quality strategies, reducing false positive rate from 2.4% to 0%
Achieved 130x performance improvement in PKV distributed serialization write speed (from 90k/s to 12 million/s)

description.zh: 腾讯企业微信的核心基础设施，整合画像中台、图能力、策略质量保障、特征系统的一站式策略管理平台，支撑10亿级用户规模的数据分析。
description.en: A core infrastructure platform for Tencent's WeChat Work, integrating portrait center, graph capabilities, strategy quality assurance, and feature systems into a one-stop strategy management platform, supporting data analysis for billions of users.

highlights.zh: 支撑10亿级用户画像分析，实现关键业务指标显著优化与核心性能百倍提升。
highlights.en: Supports portrait analysis for billions of users, achieving significant optimization of key business metrics and hundredfold improvement in core performance.

title.zh: 自建应用反作弊治理项目

zh: 未提供
en: Not Provided

zh: 累计识别违规服务商 820+ 家
累计识别违规企业 52,683+ 家
月均收益 246 万
年化收益超 300 万元
实现 30+ 模块的端到端自动化决策
en: Identified 820+ non-compliant service providers cumulatively
Identified 52,683+ non-compliant enterprises cumulatively
Average monthly revenue of 2.46 million
Annualized revenue exceeding 3 million
Implemented end-to-end automated decision-making across 30+ modules

description.zh: 企业微信生态安全的核心治理系统，通过多维度算法识别违规服务商和企业，实现端到端自动化决策。
description.en: A core governance system for WeCom ecosystem security, identifying non-compliant service providers and enterprises through multi-dimensional algorithms and enabling end-to-end automated decision-making.

highlights.zh: 多维度算法驱动的反作弊治理系统，年化收益超300万。
highlights.en: Multi-dimensional algorithm-driven anti-fraud governance system with annualized revenue exceeding 3 million.
